isolation.boundary: Only Node B and draft.choir-ip.com were accessed.

assertions.reason: Node B successfully built `nixosConfigurations.go-choir-b.config.system.build.toplevel` from a temporary copy of the current local checkout; however `/opt/go-choir` is absent and a direct GitHub flake fetch on Node B failed because the fetched repo snapshot lacked `flake.nix`.

commands: tar -C "/Users/wiz/go-choir" -cf - README.md flake.nix go.mod cmd internal nix frontend | ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 node-b "rm -rf /tmp/go-choir-node-b-check && mkdir -p /tmp/go-choir-node-b-check && tar -C /tmp/go-choir-node-b-check -xf - && nix build 'path:/tmp/go-choir-node-b-check#nixosConfigurations.go-choir-b.config.system.build.toplevel' --no-link"
evidence.observed: `/opt/go-choir` was missing, `nix build github:yusefmosiah/go-choir?ref=main#...` failed with `flake.nix` missing, and the temp-copy build on Node B exited 0.

assertions.reason: The live Node B system has no `go-choir-*` unit files. `systemctl list-unit-files` only showed existing Caddy/choiros-related units, while the staged go-choir flake defines `go-choir-auth`, `go-choir-proxy`, `go-choir-vmctl`, and `go-choir-gateway`.

commands: ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 node-b "hostname; echo '--- active runtime units'; systemctl list-unit-files --no-pager | grep -E 'go-choir-(auth|proxy|vmctl|gateway)|caddy|choiros' || true; echo '--- staged go-choir units from temp build'; nix eval --apply 'x: builtins.attrNames x' --json 'path:/tmp/go-choir-node-b-check#nixosConfigurations.go-choir-b.config.systemd.services' | jq -r '.[]' | grep '^go-choir-' || true"
evidence.observed: Runtime unit listing contained no `go-choir-*` entries; staged config evaluation listed all four expected units.

assertions.reason: `https://draft.choir-ip.com/auth/health`, `/api/health`, `/provider/health`, and `/` all returned HTTP 502. The active `/etc/caddy/caddy_config` routes all traffic to `127.0.0.1:9090`, and nothing is listening on 9090.

commands:
curl -sS -D - -o - https://draft.choir-ip.com/auth/health; echo '
---'; curl -sS -D - -o - https://draft.choir-ip.com/api/health; echo '
---'; curl -sS -D - -o - https://draft.choir-ip.com/provider/health; echo '
---'; curl -sS -D - -o - https://draft.choir-ip.com/

ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 node-b "echo '## active caddy config'; sed -n '1,120p' /etc/caddy/caddy_config; echo '## listeners'; ss -ltn '( sport = :9090 or sport = :8081 or sport = :8082 or sport = :8084 )' || true; echo '## 9090 probe'; curl -sS -D - -o - http://127.0.0.1:9090/health 2>&1 || true"
evidence.observed: Every external route returned 502; active Caddy config had a single `reverse_proxy 127.0.0.1:9090`; localhost:9090 probe failed to connect.

assertions.reason: Caddy serves a valid Let's Encrypt certificate for `draft.choir-ip.com`, and HTTPS requests complete without certificate errors.

commands: curl -sSI https://draft.choir-ip.com/; echo '---'; openssl s_client -servername draft.choir-ip.com -connect draft.choir-ip.com:443 </dev/null 2>/tmp/nodeb-cert.err | openssl x509 -noout -subject -issuer -dates; echo '---'; sed -n '1,12p' /tmp/nodeb-cert.err
evidence.observed: Certificate subject was `CN = draft.choir-ip.com`, issuer was `Let's Encrypt E7`, validity window was 2026-03-07 to 2026-06-05, and OpenSSL verification returned success.

assertions.reason: The go-choir systemd services are not installed on the live host, so there was no safe `go-choir-*` process to kill and observe for automatic restart.

commands: ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 node-b "systemctl list-unit-files --no-pager | grep '^go-choir-' || true; echo '---'; systemctl is-active go-choir-auth go-choir-proxy go-choir-vmctl go-choir-gateway 2>&1 || true"
evidence.observed: `systemctl list-unit-files` returned no `go-choir-*` units and `systemctl is-active` reported them absent/inactive.

assertions.reason: From the external validator host, TCP ports 22, 80, and 443 were reachable, while ports 8081-8084 timed out and were not externally reachable.

commands: for port in 22 80 443 8081 8082 8083 8084; do echo "## port $port"; nc -vz -G 5 draft.choir-ip.com "$port" 2>&1 || true; done; echo '---'; curl -sSI http://draft.choir-ip.com/; echo '---'; curl -sSI https://draft.choir-ip.com/
evidence.observed: `nc` succeeded on 22/80/443 and timed out on 8081/8082/8083/8084; HTTP on port 80 redirected to HTTPS and HTTPS responded from Caddy.

assertions.reason: SSH key-based login to Node B works, password-only authentication is rejected, and the server reports `permitrootlogin prohibit-password` with `passwordauthentication no`.

commands: echo '## key auth'; ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 node-b "echo ok"; echo '## password auth disabled probe'; ssh -o PreferredAuthentications=password -o PubkeyAuthentication=no -o NumberOfPasswordPrompts=0 -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 node-b "echo unexpected-success" 2>&1 || true; echo '## server settings'; ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 node-b "sshd -T | grep -E 'permitrootlogin|passwordauthentication|kbdinteractiveauthentication'"
evidence.observed: BatchMode key login returned `ok`, a password-only probe failed with `Permission denied (publickey)`, and `sshd -T` showed password authentication disabled.

frictions.description: A direct Node B build from `github:yusefmosiah/go-choir?ref=main` failed because the fetched snapshot did not contain `flake.nix`, so validation used a temporary copy of the local checkout on Node B instead.
frictions.resolution: Copied the current local checkout into `/tmp/go-choir-node-b-check` on Node B and built the flake from that path.

blockers.description: Node B is still running the older choiros-era runtime configuration instead of the go-choir NixOS deployment: `/opt/go-choir` is missing, no `go-choir-*` unit files are installed, and active Caddy config still proxies all traffic to `127.0.0.1:9090`.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified runtime state via `systemctl`, `/etc/caddy/caddy_config`, and localhost port probes; did not switch the live system because the task scope was validation only.

summary: Validated 7 Node B assertions: 4 passed (VAL-NIX-004, VAL-NIX-007, VAL-NIX-009, VAL-NIX-010), 2 failed (VAL-NIX-005, VAL-NIX-006), and 1 was blocked (VAL-NIX-008) because go-choir is not deployed on the live host.
